'''Xartun''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Ojoster sector/Legends|Ojoster sector]]<ref name="Atlas" /> that was involved in manufacturing. A [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] world, it was near [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Zsinj]]'s territory. Although the planet was a signatory to the New Republic, a deal brought about by a previous planetary leader, the [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of Xartun during [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], [[Nojin Koolb]], had it secretly allied with [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]].<ref name="Wraith Squadron" /><ref name="CSWE" />

Zsinj's facility on Xartun was constructing the same type of experimental cell as those used in [[Project Chubar]].<ref name="Solo Command">''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]''</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
